title: Factory Packet
description: A scoped unit of work in the factory system.

id.description: Kebab-case unique identifier. Must match the filename (without .json).

kind.description: Packet kind. 'dev' packets implement changes. 'qa' packets verify that a dev packet's acceptance criteria are met.

verifies.description: For QA packets: the ID of the dev packet this packet verifies. Required when kind is 'qa', must be null or absent for 'dev' packets.

intent.description: What is changing and why. Must be explicit.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable conditions that must all be true for this packet to be considered complete. Each criterion must be independently verifiable.

packages.description: Which packages or modules are affected.

phase_ref.description: Reference to a phase if applicable.

owner.description: Who is responsible for this work unit.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when work began. Null if not started.

dependencies.description: Packet IDs that must be completed/accepted before this packet can start.

environment_dependencies.description: Dependency keys that must have matching evidence records.

status.description: Packet lifecycle status. null for legacy packets whose state is derived from started_at and completion records. Review states (review_requested, changes_requested, review_approved) apply only to dev packets. 'failed' is terminal — set by the recovery layer when a packet escalates; it is mutually exclusive with 'completed' (no completion record exists for failed packets).

branch.description: Git branch name for code review. Set by request-review.ts when the developer requests review.

review_iteration.description: Number of review round-trips completed. Incremented each time the developer re-requests review after changes_requested.

feature_id.description: ID of the parent feature, if this packet belongs to a feature.

model.description: Model tier override for this packet. Overrides the persona default. Falls through to persona config if omitted.

instructions.description: Additional instructions for the agent executing this packet. Merged with persona instructions from config.

scenario.description: Identifies the failure mode. Carries either: (a) a value from the closed FailureScenario enum (ProviderTransient, ProviderUnavailable, BuildFailed, LintFailed, TestFailed, StaleBranch, AgentNonResponsive, CompletionGateBlocked) when classification produced one; (b) the literal 'Unclassified' when the recovery layer could not match the failure to any recipe; or (c) the literal 'CascadedFromDependency' when a QA packet inherited failure from a dev packet whose dependency failed. CascadedFromDependency is a packet-failure label string, NOT a 9th FailureScenario enum variant — the FailureScenario enum stays closed at 8 members. Values are not enumerated in this schema because the cascade label is intentionally outside the enum surface.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this packet failed. For escalations from the recovery loop, this is the reason field of the RecoveryResult. For cascades, this names the upstream failed dependency.

attempts.description: Number of recovery attempts made before escalation. 0 for cascade entries (no recovery was attempted on the cascading packet itself).

escalation_path.description: Path to the canonical escalation record under escalations/, or null when there is no separate escalation record (e.g. cascade entries have null because the upstream dev packet's escalation is the canonical artifact).

failure.description: Set by the recovery layer when a packet enters the terminal 'failed' status. Mirrors the canonical escalation record under escalations/ for human-readable provenance directly on the packet artifact. Always paired with status: 'failed'; never present on packets that complete successfully.
